english: Adorned with the breaking of waves flowing with drops of the ocean
roman: Sabindu sindhu sus khalat taranga bhanga ranjitam

english: Combined with waters that destroy sins collected by enemies
roman: Dvisatsu papa jata jata kari vari samyutam

english: Giving armour that removes the fear of messengers of death and terrible forms
roman: Kritanta duta kala bhuta bhiti hari varmade

english: I bow to your lotus feet O Goddess Narmada
You carry great virtues and destroy great poverty
roman: Maha gunani vahini maha daridra bhanjani

english: The river of three worlds, flowing in the ocean of compassion and essence
Always giving liberation, following the dharma as consort of Shiva
roman: Vimukti dayini sada Shiva yasya bhaaryadharmini

english: I bow to your lotus feet O Goddess Narmada
This Narmadashtakam — whoever reads it daily, the pure person
roman: Narmada ashtakam idam yah pathet nityam shuchir narah

english: Freed from all sins will go to the world of Shiva
